zh.Upton, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾厄普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret De Mulys於1380年出生在英國戴文斯維布利其時，她的父親James Mulys14歲，母親Isabella Attwode19歲。她於1400年與James DeMules在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1426年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾萊望尼可。

zh-hans.Upton, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾厄普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret De Mulys于1380年出生在英国戴文斯維布利其时，她的父亲James Mulys14岁，母亲Isabella Attwode19岁。她于1400年与James DeMules在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1426年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾萊望尼可。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mulys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) variant of Mullis . (ii) variant of Moles (2). (iii) variant of Mule with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare John Meul, 1327 in Subsidy Rolls (Newlyn East, Cornwall).

variants.name: Subsidy Rolls
meanings: English: (i) occupational name from northern Middle English * gater ‘goatherd’, a derivative of Middle English gayte ‘goat’ (from Old English gāt, with preservation of the unrounded northern ā, or from Old Scandinavian geit). See also Goater . The name is found in N England and the Midlands, and has probably also absorbed Middle English gaythird ‘goatherd’, as in John le Gaythirde, 1301 in Subsidy Rolls (Yorks), Robert Gayterd, 1466 in York Freemen’s Register . (ii) locative name from Middle English * gater ‘dweller by the town gate or gateway’, see Gate . This type of name, derived from a topographical term + -er, is mainly found in S England, especially Kent, Sussex, and Hants.

variants.name: Mule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Matteo, Sal, Carmelo, Concetta, Francesco, Gaetano, Gaspare, Gino, Rosario.
English: nickname, perhaps for a stubborn person, from Middle English mule, muel, meul, moile ‘mule’ (Old French mule). See also Moyle and Moule , with which this name may have been interchangeable.

variants.name: Moles
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Mullis
meanings: variant of Moule , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

habitational name from Mowlish Farm in Kenton (Devon). The placename appears to mean ‘farm of the mules’, from the genitive plural form of Old English mūl ‘mule’ + hīwisc ‘family, measure of land that would support a family’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret De Mulys was born in 1380, in Swimbridge, Devon, England, her father, James Mulys, was 14 and her mother, Isabella Attwode, was 19. She married James DeMules in 1400, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1426, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Lewannick, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret De Mulys est née en 1380, à Swimbridge, Devon, Angleterre, son père, James Mulys, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Isabella Attwode, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé James DeMules en 1400, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1426, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewannick, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret De Mulys 1380 in Swimbridge, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Mulys 14 und ihre Mutter Isabella Attwode 19. Sie hat 1400 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom James DeMules geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1426 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lewannick, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret De Mulys è nata il nel 1380 nel Swimbridge, Devon, England, sua padre, James Mulys, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Isabella Attwode, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato James DeMules nel 1400, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1426, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Lewannick, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret De Mulysが1380年にイギリスデボンスウィンブリッジで生まれた時，父James Mulysは14歳，母Isabella Attwodeは19歳であった。1400年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでJames DeMulesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1426年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで47歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルルアニックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Mulys(이)가 1380년 영국 데폰 스위브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Mulys(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Attwode(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 James DeMules(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 루아닉크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret De Mulys nasceu em 1380, em Swimbridge, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Mulys, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Attwode, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com James DeMules em 1400, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1426, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Lewannick, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret De Mulys родилась в 1380 г. в местности свимбридж, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени James Mulys было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Attwode, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James DeMules в 1400 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1426 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности льванникк, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret De Mulys nació en 1380, en Swimbridge, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, James Mulys, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Isabella Attwode, tenía 19 años. Se casó con James DeMules en 1400, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1426, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Lewannick, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
